Quickstart
GitHub

New

Template based on Vue3、Vite、Element-Plus、TypeScript、Pinia

Fast

Lightweight and fast hot reloading, easy to get started with development.

Delicate

Offers a variety of layout options to satisfy diverse visual requirements

Richness

Multiple encapsulated component sets, dynamic permission menus, etc.
